Dear Sarah, please forward this to J. The buyer (I just found out) is Ken Rice.

-----Original Message-----
From: olivia@frenchvacation.com
To: Jpm6929@aol.com
Sent: Sun, 24 Dec 2006 3:07 PM
Subject: Last chance to buy Chateau Villette

Dear Juan Pablo,

Holiday Greetings!!! Are you in Paris? I am arriving Paris to meet up with the buyer of Villette to sign contract on Dec. 27. This is the last chance for Jeff Epstein to buy Villette if he wants it. Please let me know at your earliest convenience. I fly out of SFO on Dec. 25. My meeting with buyer and his CPA is 3pm on Dec. 27. They offered me 18,500,000 euros without furnishings and they want to buy furnishing and antiques, tapestries, rugs, paintings, etc. for 3 million euros separately and we will go over all items on Wednesday. If you and Pillar are available, please come for dinner on New Years Eve and meet some wonderful people from San Francisco.

Best Wishes for a Merry Christmas, Olivia
